How can we help?

Our elite support team is available 24/7 to assist with your advertising and publishing needs.

Frequently Asked Questions

How do I join Chariotads?

To join as a publisher or advertiser, simply click 'Join Now' on our home page or navigate to the respective role pages. Fill out the application, and our elite team will review it within 24 hours.

What are the payment terms?

We offer weekly payouts for publishers with a low minimum threshold ($50). We support Wire, PayPal, and Paxum.

What ad formats do you support?

We support a wide variety of formats including Banners (IAB Standard), Pop Unders, Interstitials, and Native Ads.

Is the traffic safe?

Yes. Our proprietary anti-fraud technology and rigorous testing ensure all traffic is malware-free and high-quality.
